TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tkijig, title = Tkijig, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tkijig} }

S.FORM: == Tkijig == u sulit nu Hulam ŚĺóŚźČŚą©ťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tkijig. u kasalumaluma' nu Tkijig sa, 219 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 684 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 410 ku tademaw, pakalatu 60%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 274 ku tademaw, pakalatu 40%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Taluku(Truku) 50%, Pangcah(Amis) 4%, Tayan(Tayal) 3%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Saysia(SaySiyat) 1%, zumazuma 2%. u niyazu' nu Taluku(Truku) u niyazu' nu Taluku(Truku) kuyni, katuud ku Taluku(Truku) itini mueneng. u zuma a tademaw sa u Yuwatan(Bunun), u Tayan atu Pangcah. inayi' tu ku zuma cidekay a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inay' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihcan 11 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052)
S.PHON: == tkijig == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu tkijig. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tkijig sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, tar~…ĺuku(truku) **%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, sajsia(sajsijat) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu tar~…ĺuku(truku) u nijazu Ē~ ° nu tar~…ĺuku(truku) kujni, katuud ku tar~…ĺuku(truku) itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u juwatan(bunun), u tajan atu paŇč ¶ańß. inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaj Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: == Tkijig == u sulit nu Hulam ŚĺóŚźČŚą©ťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tkijig. u kasalumaluma' nu Tkijig sa, 219 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 684 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 410 ku tademaw, pakalatu 60%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 274 ku tademaw, pakalatu 40%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Taluku(Truku) 50%, Pangcah(Amis) 4%, Tayan(Tayal) 3%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Saysia(SaySiyat) 1%, zumazuma 2%. u niyazu' nu Taluku(Truku) u niyazu' nu Taluku(Truku) kuyni, katuud ku Taluku(Truku) itini mueneng. u zuma a tademaw sa u Yuwatan(Bunun), u Tayan atu Pangcah. inayi' tu ku zuma cidekay a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inay' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihcan 11 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052)
S.PHON: == tkijig == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu tkijig. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tkijig sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, tar~…ĺuku(truku) **%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, sajsia(sajsijat) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu tar~…ĺuku(truku) u nijazu Ē~ ° nu tar~…ĺuku(truku) kujni, katuud ku tar~…ĺuku(truku) itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u juwatan(bunun), u tajan atu paŇč ¶ańß. inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaj Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
